title: Sam's Summer Shifts · the sequel
notes: Entries reveal when their token lands in GauntletState.lore_tokens_revealed (hosts emit on finished; conditional tokens per manifest). Schema matches pirate_summer/scrapbook.json.

entries.title: The summer, shifted
entries.blurb: The Kwik Stop again, a generation on, with the ghost of the first manager sim in the walls. Shifts got worked. The cooler hummed the same hum.

entries.title: Sam vs. Sam
entries.blurb: Two Sams, one store, thirty years apart. You understood the rivalry the game never states: the store is the third Sam, and it always wins on points.
